the_void_fog_set: Floating in the mist of the digital ghost / Finding the guest, finding the host
Radiation fog in the Phrygian night / Washing the logic, washing the light
Diffusion of the soul, diffusion of the mind / Leaving the physical far behind
the_infinite_tail_set: Endless decay in the void of the code / Following the echoes on the fractal road
Six seconds of silence, stretched into a year / Erasing the distance, erasing the fear
Infinite room, infinite breath / Dreaming of life in the digital death
the_spatial_dialogue: Breathe the space / Feel the deep
Find the place / Where we sleep

psychoacoustic_reverb_v4.the_shimmer_factor: +12st pitch-shifted feedback-loop in the reverb tank (15% mix)
psychoacoustic_reverb_v4.the_drowning_effect: Increase Reverb_Mix to 95% + LowPass(500Hz) during the bridge
